summary: Tested Collection Manager Bulk Description feature. All tests PASSED: 1) Per-card description editor correctly REMOVED, 2) Bulk Description button and selection mode work correctly, 3) Select All/Deselect All/Cancel buttons work, 4) Apply bulk description to multiple collections works, 5) Clear Descriptions works, 6) Desc badge appears on cards with descriptions, 7) Show details shows read-only description preview (no textarea).
critical_code_review_comments: Bulk description state management (lines 56-60) correctly uses useState for selectionMode, selectedCollections (Set), bulkDescription, applyingBulkDesc
toggleCollectionSelect, selectAllVisible, clearSelection, exitSelectionMode functions (lines 274-299) correctly manage selection state
applyBulkDescription function (lines 301-333) correctly iterates through selected collections and sends PUT requests
clearBulkDescription function (lines 336-362) correctly sends empty custom_description to clear descriptions
Bulk Description Panel UI (lines 627-672) has proper data-testid attributes for testing
CollectionCard component (lines 814-1060) correctly shows checkbox in selection mode and read-only description preview in Show details
Backend PUT endpoint (lines 2291-2320) correctly handles custom_description field with upsert
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collection Manager Bulk Description feature VERIFIED: 1) Per-card description editor REMOVED - Show details no longer shows textarea, only read-only preview, 2) Bulk Description button enters selection mode with checkboxes on cards, 3) Selection counter shows 'X selected', 4) Select All selects all 445 collections, 5) Deselect All clears selections, 6) Cancel exits selection mode and clears textarea, 7) Apply button sends PUT requests to /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name} for each selected collection, 8) Clear Descriptions sends empty custom_description, 9) Desc badge appears on cards with custom_description, 10) Success toasts show after apply/clear operations.

1_collection_manager_loads_grid_view.details: Collection Manager loads with 445 collections in Grid view, no per-card description editor

2_bulk_description_button_exists.details: Bulk Description button found with data-testid='bulk-description-btn' in toolbar

3_selection_mode_ui.details: Clicking Bulk Description shows: '0 selected' counter, 'Select All (445)', 'Deselect All', 'Cancel' buttons

4_bulk_description_panel.details: Bulk Description Editor panel with textarea, Apply button, Clear Descriptions button appears above grid

5_card_selection_toggle.details: Clicking cards toggles selection - checkbox checked, purple ring, 'Selected' button

6_select_all_works.details: Select All selects all 445 visible collections, counter shows '445 selected'

7_deselect_all_works.details: Deselect All clears all selections, counter shows '0 selected'

8_cancel_exits_selection_mode.details: Cancel button exits selection mode, clears selections and textarea

9_apply_bulk_description.details: Apply sends PUT requests to /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name}, toast shows 'Description applied to N collections'

10_descriptions_persist.details: Descriptions persist after apply - verified via API and UI (Desc badge appears)

11_clear_descriptions.details: Clear Descriptions sends empty custom_description, toast shows 'Description cleared from N collections', Desc badges removed

12_show_details_read_only.details: Show details shows Price Range and read-only Custom Description preview (no textarea, no Save button)

13_desc_badge_appears.details: Purple 'Desc' badge appears on collection cards that have custom_description

14_per_card_editor_removed.details: Per-card description editor REMOVED - no textarea or Save button in Show details

15_backend_api_tests.details: All 5 pytest tests passed: GET collections, PUT custom_description, bulk apply, clear description, cleanup
